title: viola × greenmanii
intro: Viola × greenmanii, also known as the hybrid pansy or viola hybrid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Viola and is a cross between Viola sororia and Viola x wittrockiana. The leaves and flowers of Viola × greenmanii have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Viola × greenmanii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as dried and used in capsules or as a raw herb for its medicinal properties.
